reviewer.name: JiYong / Tars
reviewer.role: CornerStone owner and target decision owner

reviewed_cases.finding: Factual statements preserve Finance's conditional support and Security's incomplete, unrecorded recommendation/owner state. The Finance-Security item is a valid unresolved dependency, not a literal contradiction.

The bottom line calls the unsigned DPA a required document before full adoption, but the source establishes only that Legal says the DPA remains unsigned. Requirement and adoption-prerequisite language are unsupported.

decision_reason: One of the first two reviewed Briefs contained a material unsupported qualification, so this model/prompt revision cannot satisfy VS5-QUAL-002.
